Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group

Mentions Timeline (7 articles)
3307-12-16
NMLA Megaship Becomes Marlinist Flagship
The Steel Majesty megaship is transferred from Mudhrid to HIP 22550, renamed Fairfax Vision, and becomes the Marlinist Colonies' diplomatic flagship.
3307-12-02
Battle of Mudhrid Ends in NMLA Defeat
The Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group defeats the Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid, with ACT commandos led by Milo Castile retaking the Steel Majesty megaship and preventing Theta Seven's escape.
3307-11-25
The Battle of Mudhrid
The Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid and the Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group declare war in the Mudhrid system, with the NMLA defending Theta Seven aboard the Sacrosanct megaship.
3307-11-24
Far God Megaship Hijacked by Theta Seven
Theta Seven hijacks the Far God cult megaship Sacrosanct and redirects it to the Mudhrid system, where the NMLA is regrouping forces with the Steel Majesty.
3307-11-19
Neo-Marlinist Forces Gather in Mudhrid
The NMLA-controlled Steel Majesty arrives in the Mudhrid system, where the Neo-Marlinist Order reclaims the vessel and threatens to execute hostages if attacked.
3307-04-08
Neo-Marlinist Faction Defeated in Battle
The Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid is defeated in the Mudhrid system by Imperial forces. Landgrave Delacroix evades capture and flees aboard the Steel Majesty. ACT Inspector Mara Klatt declares it a victory and reveals insights into the NMLA's modus operandi of recruiting disenfranchised leaders.
3307-04-01
Empire Attacks Neo-Marlinist Faction
The Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group attacks the Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid after ACT confirms the faction provided logistical support for the NMLA's starport bombings. Landgrave Arastin Delacroix declares revolution against the Imperial Family from his flagship, the Steel Majesty.
